title: SPA + Timeline Redesign
changes: Migrated from per-day HTML files to single-page app (report.html + app.js)
Unified timeline card design for all 6 tabs (Option C v2)
Operation time in timeline nodes instead of statement numbers
Color-coded cards: purple (settlement), orange (tank), blue (deep strike), green (default)
Red hit indicator on nodes for confirmed strikes
Phase dividers show operation count
Python categorizer script for 97% token reduction
JSON data files replace generated HTML
LTR direction for all time/date elements
Auto-increment version on every push

title: Full Text Format Fix
changes: Fixed full text display across all reports (Apr 1-7)
JS object + DOM textContent approach preserves Arabic line breaks
Full bayan text includes bismillah, Quran verses, date, hashtags

title: Landing Page + Polish
changes: Custom domain (harbi-reports.com)
Mobile responsiveness: smaller text, tighter gaps, no overflow
Global smart search on landing page with Arabic normalization
Auto-categorization dashboards for enemy + Iran tabs
Clean verbose targets, correct badge colors across all reports

title: Maps + Fullscreen
changes: Fullscreen button on all maps (siren + operations)
Dark/light tile swap on theme toggle
Map marker colors match dashboard bar charts

title: Enhancements System
changes: Shared report-enhancements.js across all reports
Hero summary with operation chips
Prev/next day navigation
Operations map with target markers
Siren categorization: region bars, type pills, timeline, filters

title: Interactive Features
changes: Interactive siren map with Leaflet (hover, click, popups)
Bayanat categorization dashboard
Dark/light theme toggle

title: Calendar Landing Page
changes: Calendar view with month navigation
Heatmap coloring by report density
Tooltips with category breakdown
Home button on all reports

title: Initial Release
changes: First reports: Apr 6-7, 2026
6-tab layout: bayanat, sirens, enemy, Iran, videos, allies
Full text toggle on every card
Smart search with Arabic normalization + English aliases
